description: Veo 3 + Runway + Higgsfield hero video prompt library. Her item'in ayri bir prompt_id'si var. Batch render scripts/ai-video/generate-hero.ts bunu okur.
shared_suffix: color palette: terracotta #C2684A, sage #7A9E82, coastal blue #4A6D88, rich sand #D4B483, cinematic 35mm film aesthetic, shallow depth of field, photorealistic, natural skin texture, Mediterranean atmosphere, no watermarks, no text overlays, no third-party logos, no copyrighted team jerseys, proportional body, five fingers per hand.

items.prompt: A 17-year-old Turkish female volleyball player mid-air executing a powerful spike, slow-motion 120fps, dramatic side-angle medium-close shot with a subtle dolly-in, rim-lit by golden afternoon Mediterranean sun filtering through an open gymnasium, warm terracotta walls and sage-green floor lines in background, sweat droplets visible in the light, determined expression.

Vertical 9:16 portrait composition: A 17-year-old Turkish female volleyball player mid-air executing a powerful spike, slow-motion 120fps, close-up to medium framing, rim-lit by golden afternoon Mediterranean sun, warm terracotta and sage-green background, sweat droplets visible, determined focus.

Wide aerial drone shot orbiting slowly around a young Turkish volleyball player serving on an outdoor beach court at golden hour, Aegean Sea behind, sand kicking up from her feet, camera rises 2 meters as ball launches, warm amber lighting with long shadows, calm determined face, Mediterranean coastal breeze moving her hair naturally.

Medium close-up shot, six diverse young athletes in terracotta and sage training kits high-fiving in slow-motion after winning a point, indoor academy with wooden accents and warm sand-colored walls, backlit by soft daylight through large windows, camera locked-off steady, joyful authentic emotion, natural skin tones.

A 42-year-old Turkish male volleyball coach demonstrating a block technique to two teenage athletes on an indoor academy court, tracking shot from behind at chest-height, warm natural lighting through skylights, walls in warm terracotta and sand tones, sage-green court lines, coach wears an unbranded terracotta polo, students focused and respectful, cinematic calm pace, documentary style.

A teenage female volleyball player diving horizontally to dig a hard-driven ball, freeze-frame moment of full extension, extreme low-angle tracking shot, indoor court with sage lines, dust particles in golden side-light, determined pre-contact face, pads visible, authentic effort, slow-motion 120fps feel.

Vertical shot of a young Turkish female athlete in training kit performing a lateral band walk in front of a gym mirror, focused expression, warm gym lighting with terracotta accent walls, reflection fades slightly, camera glides left-to-right parallel, clean editorial sports feel, 60fps cinematic.

Locker-room tunnel shot: eight teenage volleyball players walking toward the court at dusk, shot from behind at eye-level, warm orange rim-light from tunnel end, silhouettes with glimpses of terracotta kits, anticipatory pace, sound of cheers muffled, Mediterranean pre-match atmosphere.
